report.title: Potential sites mapping
report.description: Potential sites from samples with no location - mapping version
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM cache_samples_functional s LEFT JOIN cache_samples_functional s2 ON ST_SnapToGrid(ST_Centroid(s2.public_geom), 10) = ST_SnapToGrid(ST_Centroid(s.public_geom), 10) AND s2.parent_sample_id IS NULL AND s2.location_id IS NOT NULL AND s2.private = false AND s2.sensitive = false AND s2.website_id IN (#website_ids#) #filters# LEFT JOIN locations l2 ON l2.id = s2.location_id AND l2.deleted=false WHERE s.parent_sample_id IS NULL AND s.survey_id=#survey_id# AND s.location_id IS NULL AND s.private = false AND s.sensitive = false AND s.website_id IN (#website_ids#) #filters# #group_bys# HAVING count(*) > 1
report.count_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT #columns# FROM cache_samples_functional s WHERE s.parent_sample_id IS NULL AND s.location_id IS NULL AND s.private = false AND s.sensitive = false AND s.website_id IN (#website_ids#) #filters# GROUP BY ROUND(ST_y(ST_Transform(ST_SnapToGrid(ST_Centroid(s.public_geom), 10), 4326))::numeric, 6), ROUND(ST_x(ST_Transform(ST_SnapToGrid(ST_Centroid(s.public_geom), 10), 4326))::numeric, 6) HAVING count(*) > 1 ) AS subquery
